summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NetShield Phishing Simulation feature. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing successful - login, navigation, templates display, and campaign creation dialog all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: The phishing.py route imports from 'utils' module which doesn't exist, but uses local fallback - consider cleaning up unused import or creating utils.py
Email sending is in SIMULATION MODE (SMTP not configured) - emails are marked as sent but not actually delivered. This is expected behavior per requirements.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test admin account and Acme Corp organization
context_for_next_testing_agent: All phishing simulation features tested and working: templates CRUD, campaigns CRUD, tracking codes generation, email open/click tracking, campaign lifecycle (draft->active->paused->completed). Email sending is in simulation mode (no SMTP configured). 3 default templates seeded: IT Password Reset, HR Benefits Update, Package Delivery Notification.

phishing_campaigns_api.create_campaign: PASS - generates unique tracking codes per target
phishing_campaigns_api.launch_campaign: PASS - emails marked as sent (simulation mode)

tracking_endpoints.email_open_tracking_pixel: PASS - returns 1x1 GIF, records open in DB
tracking_endpoints.link_click_tracking: PASS - records click, shows security awareness page

frontend_ui.create_campaign_dialog: PASS - has name, org, template, target users fields

features_tested.kingsley_accounts_role: PASS - Both Kingsley accounts show super_admin role (bug fix verified)

mocked_apis.email_sending: MOCKED - emails are simulated when SMTP is not configured. The send_phishing_email function marks emails as sent without actually delivering them.
